summary: V56.2 Adaptive AI Content System - All tests pass. Fixed critical bug in InteractiveModule where items weren't loading due to async state initialization. Backend adaptive deep-dive with visit tracking and perspective rotation working correctly. Frontend DeepDive with 'Go Deeper' button verified.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: InteractiveModule.js line 542-549 - shuffledItems was initialized with useState(() => ...) which captured empty items array on mount. Changed to useEffect with items dependency to re-shuffle when items load asynchronously.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V56.2 Adaptive AI verified: (1) Backend POST /api/knowledge/deep-dive returns visit_number and perspective fields, (2) Second call with 'fresh' context returns different perspective and incremented visit_number, (3) Frontend Crystals page now loads 12 items correctly after InteractiveModule fix, (4) StudyPanel shows Listen + Explore deeper buttons, (5) DeepDive 'Go Deeper' button triggers fresh AI content with rotated perspective, (6) Teachings page shows Buddha with 5 teachings (Four Noble Truths, Eightfold Path, Dependent Origination, Loving-Kindness, Heart Sutra), (7) All 8 InteractiveModule pages load with items (Crystals 12, Mudras 25, Nourishment 8, Reiki 10, Acupressure 10, Aromatherapy 12).

features_verified.backend_deep_dive_visit_tracking: PASS - Returns visit_number and perspective fields
features_verified.backend_deep_dive_fresh_content: PASS - 'fresh' context triggers new perspective, increments visit_number
features_verified.frontend_crystals_page: PASS - 12 crystals load with discovery grid
features_verified.frontend_study_panel_buttons: PASS - Listen + Explore deeper + Nova + Cross-Cultural Insight buttons present
features_verified.frontend_deep_dive_go_deeper: PASS - Go Deeper button appears after AI content loads (~55s)
features_verified.frontend_teachings_buddha: PASS - Buddha shows 5 teachings with expand/collapse
features_verified.frontend_interactive_modules: PASS - All 8 pages load with items (Mudras, Nourishment, Reiki, Acupressure, Aromatherapy, Crystals, Herbology via Botany, Elixirs)

bug_fixed.issue: Items not loading on Crystals page - showed 'No results found'
bug_fixed.root_cause: useState(() => shuffle(items)) captured empty items array at mount time. Async-loaded items never triggered re-shuffle.
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to useEffect with [items] dependency to re-shuffle when items load
